programme.title: Squatters
programme.desc: In Cleveland, Ray is ready to move back home-until he discovers an intruder linked to his previous tenant has taken over his house; when Flash and his team step inside, it's anything but a routine squatter removal job; the house is uninhabitable, and the danger runs far deeper than expected.

programme.title: Neighborhood Wars
programme.desc: In Chesterfield, Virginia, a downstairs neighbor confrontation over moving noise quickly escalates; in Florida, a family is shocked when their doorbell camera captures a neighbor entering their home uninvited; and in Glenwood, Iowa, a man springs into action when an active shooter threatens his neighbor's home.

programme.title: Neighborhood Wars
programme.desc: A family in Iowa is horrified when they learn an intruder is lurking in their home while they sleep. A property line dispute in Texas gets personal with cursing, honking and a loud bang. And a Florida homeowner contends with racist verbal abuse from his next- door neighbor.

programme.title: Neighborhood Wars
programme.desc: When a Washington man is upset with his neighbors for burning wood in their backyard, it shockingly turns into a shootout; a Florida woman wrestles with an aggressive neighbor trying to force her way into her apartment.

programme.title: Neighborhood Wars
programme.desc: A woman claims she owns a dog currently being cared for by a mother and son; another woman insists that her neighbor has been mistakenly planting flowers on her property.

programme.title: Neighborhood Wars
programme.desc: War erupts between two neighbors in a Washington, D.C. parking lot, involving traffic cones and handwritten notes; a Santa Rosa, California, neighbor wears out his welcome donning a controversial shirt in his apartment complex.

programme.title: Neighborhood Wars
programme.desc: An Oklahoma man is at odds with his next-door neighbor over the property line and the animals on his farm.

programme.title: Neighborhood Wars
programme.desc: A Florida woman finds herself in hot water with a fellow resident in her building when she soaks in the hot tub after dark; two neighbors in California go head-to-head over newly-installed security cameras.

programme.title: Neighborhood Wars
programme.desc: In California, a man threatens a couple with pepper spray over their dog's behavior; in Georgia, a construction crew faces off with a neighbor determined to shut them down; in Kentucky, a woman renting out her home gets a wake-up call from a neighbor about a loud party at the property.

programme.title: Neighborhood Wars
programme.desc: An elderly New York couple find themselves in the middle of a dispute with their neighbors over a light in front of their house; in Nashville, Tennessee, two neighbors face off about a fence placed over their shared property line.

programme.title: Neighborhood Wars
programme.desc: In New Jersey, a dispute between two pet owners intensifies and leads to a balcony brawl.

programme.title: Neighborhood Wars
programme.desc: In Boston, a couple accuses their neighbors of feeding their dog chicken bones; a Florida man cleaning his rental home makes a shocking discovery under the bed.

programme.title: Neighborhood Wars
programme.desc: In Tennessee, a pest control salesman going door to door is confronted by an irate neighbor; a terrifying midnight home invasion in Michigan ends with gunfire.

programme.title: Neighborhood Wars
programme.desc: An Oklahoma City woman loses her cool after accusing neighbors of letting their dog do its business right outside her patio; a Michigan family is shocked when a neighbor shows up at their front door with a loaded gun; and in California, a quick-thinking woman confronts suspected snack snatchers at a tennis club.

programme.title: Neighborhood Wars
programme.desc: In Florida, neighbors call the police on a man who is blasting loud music and scattering household items in the street; construction workers in Georgia clash with a neighbor who accuses them of shoddy work; and in Nevada, a handyman is confronted by a man claiming to be with Homeland Security.

programme.title: Squatters
programme.desc: A Connecticut homeowner is pushed to the brink by a self-proclaimed pastor who has occupied his property for nearly two years; after restricting bathroom access and repeatedly clashing with the owner and other tenants, Flash and his team are called in to confront this savvy squatter, who has an unholy grip on the house.

programme.title: Squatters
programme.desc: An upstate New York couple is locked out of their own home by squatters who complain about a mouse infestation — but still refuse to leave; when the occupants allegedly forge a lease, the dispute escalates from a property battle to a potential criminal claim; but Flash and his team have one mission: reclaim the home for its rightful owners.

programme.title: Squatters
programme.desc: In Washington, three sisters call on Flash after squatters take over their late grandfather's property; the house has been transformed into a hoarder's den, the backyard into a full-blown junkyard, and squatters seem to appear at every turn; to take back the home, Flash sets his sights on the ringleader, hoping the rest will finally fall in line.

programme.title: Squatters
programme.desc: During renovations, Andrew's Philadelphia home was taken over by squatters who moved in, changed the locks and installed security cameras; what begins as a straightforward case quickly escalates into a tense standoff with authorities, as Flash and his team attempt to reclaim the property without any help from the neighborhood.

programme.desc: A pet owner concerned about the pesticide being sprayed by a neighbour is accused of assault after a heated confrontation.

programme.desc: A ten-week-old baby has choked on his milk. Tony has a flesh-eating leg infection. And is the bruising on Gerald's leg more serious than he realises.
